name: CircleCI

naming.description: Standard POSIX. CIRCLE_ prefix vars are auto-injected by CircleCI.

limits.notes: No documented hard limits. Env vars can be set at org, project, or context level. Context-level vars are shared across projects.

notes: CircleCI supports Contexts for sharing secrets across projects. Vars set in project settings are masked in logs. Use restricted contexts with security groups for sensitive credentials.
